programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: When Daniel and Ruby move to the orchard home inherited from Daniel’s eccentric uncle, it seems inhospitable - until Ruby discovers a magic well.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off on their heroic quest and, almost immediately, a winged serpent steals their map to Eagle Mountain.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: A fire-breathing Giant Chicken is destroying the local farmers' prize vegetables. Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the Giant Chicken, but... gets captured by her instead.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: When Prince Ivandoe valiantly sets free Brian the Bard, he discovers he is now stuck with him... until such time that Brian saves Prince Ivandoe's life in return.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: In an effort to impress Jezebel the thiefstress, Prince Ivandoe and Bert set off to find the elusive Centicore.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe vows to capture the turnip thief... the very worst type of thief!

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: June has been doing her Te Xuan Ze thing (acting as the Protector) for just over a month, and it's become a real hassle.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: When June's school chorus goes to a nursing home to perform, Roger finds half of a cursed Viking medallion.

programme.title: The Life & Times of Juniper Lee S1
programme.desc: Every year on April Fools' Day, Orchid Bay City is overrun by practical jokes.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou joins a secret division of Starfleet, tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: While in Paris, France, Ben catches Zombozo robbing the Louvre, but when Zombozo hypnotizes Ben to remain speechless, Ben must navigate a foreign land like a mime in order to stop the criminal clown and his travelling circus.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: A trip to the South Pole goes upside down when Team Tennyson lands on the North Pole instead, but Ben quickly discovers the culprits: Solar & Polar Twain, magnetically-powered scientists who want to hold the world ransom by threatening to reverse Earth's magnetic poles!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max arrive at a Native American national park to witness the Ayasha Plinths - an ancient Stonehenge-like rock formation - but when the sinister sorcerer Hex arrives, Ben must battle against a beast Hex magically made out of huge rocks!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson checks out a Samurai Museum in Tokyo, where Ben is too impatient to wait out the Calligraphy experience for the more exciting-sounding Samurai one, but when a dangerous Samurai sword is stolen from the exhibit, Ben must take on its thief - the new Big Bad in town, the Forever Knight.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a tour of the Japanese Robotics Museum, Ben finds hero-gone-wrong Tim Buktu 'trying to save' Tokyo from a Dragon, but has Tim finally turned over a new leaf, or is this just another one of his half-baked plans to play the part of hero?

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: A wish involving a librarian, a treasure map and a new perspective all help Ruby discover that her love of helping others comes from her late mom.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert take a lovely, but lost and confused, Swanstress under their wing.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe S1
programme.desc: Prince Ivandoe and Bert reluctantly agree to bring Princess Syllabob, of the Underwater Kingdom, an all-powerful Trident for her Sweet Sixteenth birthday.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.desc: While visiting China, Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max take a trek to the Great Wall, but their adventure is nearly ruined by daredevils LaGrange and Vin Ethanol trying to jump the international monument, and Ben must hop into the Rustbuggy to chase away the fast and furious foes.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a family cookout at a forest campsite, Charmcaster users her magic to switch places with Gwen, but when Ben catches 'Charmcaster' sneaking about, he attacks- unaware it's actually his cursed cousin!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colorado, Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on a hike to find the Forgeti, but when they realize they've stumbled upon Billy Billions own 'Winter in July' ski resort, Ben must battle Billy-with an assist from the Forgeti itself.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben hops into the Rustbuggy for a driving lesson along the sand dunes of Cape Cod, but he takes a freaky switchback turn when the Rustbuggy is mutated into a motor-monster by Bootleg - another alien transformation of Kevin 11, with powers similar to Upgrade!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson travel to the Chrysalen Institute for some hot yoga and good vibes, only to find that the Bugg Brothers are on vacation, too- but are the sneaky insectoids really on holiday, or just cooking up yet another silly, yet high stakes scheme?

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: After a battle with Kevin gets mysteriously cut short, Ben turns his attention to one-upping Gwen at Space Camp, but when his arch-nemesis, Kevin, returns with his sights strangely set on his cousin, our hero must uncover who is really behind it all: Charmcaster!

programme.title: Gabby’S Dollhouse: The Movie

programme.title: Superman Iii

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The habitat is celebrating “Sloth Day” in honor of its newest arrival: cool, chill, Lucia the sloth, who just arrived from Costa Rica! At first, the gang is excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever; everywhere they go, people are walking around in sloth masks-- even Kate is fawning over her! Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! When Lucia overhears Melman lament that there’s not enough room in the habitat for another animal, she decides to strike out and go someplace where she is welcome. Realizing the error of his unwelcoming ways, Melman and the gang must try to win Lucia back and bring her back to the habitat before Kate (and the rest of the city) notices she’s gone!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

programme.desc: When a mysterious cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son in New England.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: A kung-fu fighter avenges his relatives, slain by their gangster boss.

programme.desc: When a ghost-fearing magician falls for his staffer, who happens to be haunted by her dead best friend, he must face his fears while convincing her he'd make an excellent boyfriend.

programme.title: Hide and Never Seek

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: From heiress of a giant media empire to wanted felon, witness the strange saga of the Patty Hearst kidnapping of 1974.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the drama of the 'Son of Sam' murders, presented the way the events were covered at the time.

programme.title: Denzel Washington: American Icon
programme.desc: This in-depth documentary explores the remarkable journey of Denzel Washington, a powerhouse actor who has redefined what it means to be a leading man in Hollywood.

programme.title: Roger Federer: A Champion's Journey
programme.desc: Wimbledon Stadium’s Honour Board is full of illustrious names. And in 1998, another emerged. Roger Federer. His journey to the top of the men’s game is the one of a true champion, in every sense of the word.

programme.title: David Attenborough: A Life On Earth
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough, a legendary communicator and educator, has traveled the world for over six decades, inspiring millions with his captivating storytelling and bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Witness the fighter-bomber F-111 in action, from the jungle battles of Vietnam to the desert wars of the Middle East.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: See how the P-47 Thunderbolt dominated the skies while dealing destruction on the ground in both Germany and the Pacific.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Examine the 2002 sniper attacks in Washington D.C. through police audio and video, as well as local and national news reports. The sniper’s three-week reign of terror triggered one of the most intense and complicated manhunts in American history.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: See the meteoric rise and tragic end of civil rights activist Malcolm X, captured by rarely seen archival footage.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes S2
programme.desc: Witness the story of President Clinton's impeachment, presented through archival footage of the day.

programme.title: The Humboldt Current
programme.desc: The current is followed by a unique population of Chilean blue whales and is the last refuge for other extremely rare marine mammals. From the chill of its deepest depths to the wind on its highest cliffs the current creates unusual habitats and is a study in survival.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Dubai, Luke goes all out with adrenaline-packed dives, jetpacking thrills, golf swings, and speedboat races—then shares Potter memories over dinner…the loser picks up the tab!

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Poland, Sophie trades a calm weekend for a rush of adventure: trekking the towering Tatras, rafting wild rivers, uncovering a legendary salt mine, and so much more!

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Innsbruck, the twins whisk Haley to an alpine wonderland of skiing, bobsledding, après-ski drinks, and a magical trip down childhood stardom—plus a touch of witchcraft!

programme.title: Fantastic Friends
programme.desc: In Ireland, the twins join Evanna and her family for hurling matches, traditional dance, Potter nostalgia, and a spine-tingling countryside adventure!

programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro, Burple and Cutter are left alone in the roost to care for some dragon eggs, but a trio of tricky Slinkwings want those eggs for themselves.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Cutter gets a chance to be a "mom" when a newly hatched dragon bonds with him, and they'll both be needed to get the others out of a tangled mess.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: While showing off their new teleportation suits, Peabody and Sherman accidentally teleport inside Orchoptitron without enough juice to teleport out.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody invites Shakespeare on the show in hopes of being cast as Romeo. When he doesn't get the part, he does anything and everything to fix the mistake.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders discover the Ice Realm and find Buzzsaw inside.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Alex and Eugene find themselves at odds with Tom and their fellow dragon riders when Feathers and Webmaster go missing during a blizzard in the Ice Realm.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: To bring peace to his kingdom, King Julien “civilizes” a Foosa.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien discovers diapers and brings style to his lemur subjects, igniting a fashion war.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Artephius tries to warn the town when an evil mouse charms his way into San Lorenzo – but no one will listen to him.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Cleevil, an orphan goblin, seeks refuge in San Lorenzo – but, unbeknownst to Puss, he is in cahoots with the Duchess.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: After Thunk and Guy tell Eep and Dawn a campfire story of Gorgwatch, a hideous monster who roams the woods, the girls are terrified. After a sleepless night, Guy and Thunk assure the girls it's just a made up story. Dawn and Eep are relieved until they find proof that Gorgwatch is real... and he's coming for them.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Guy invents a primitive skateboard, Eep and Dawn have a blast trying new tricks. But when the punch monkeys want to take over the girl's awesome new skate spot, Dawn and the punch monkeys enter a skate-off to win back the skate canyon once and for all.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil learns no one on the farm thinks he's fun, he sets out to prove them all wrong... by building a crazy amusement park.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss accidentally sells Tim's favorite Football Mike toy at a family yard sale, he shirks his duties as a CEO to try to get it back. But the villains pick up on his one weakness, his brother, and so begins a game of elaborate keep-away.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The combined villains have taken over Baby Corp HQ, and a disastrous chupie teleportation accident has all the office babies scattered to the wind. Boss has to regain his leadership gusto to convince Baby Corp to regroup, as Tim and Danny share an emotional last day together before Danny leaves town for good.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With the Baby Corp babies exiled from their office and hiding in the Templeton basement, Boss and a trusted team storm Baby Corp to take it back from the villains. Having decided to retire and pass the CEO-ship onto to Staci, he also prepares Tim for her new life as an older brother to just a normal baby brother.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When a tiny Fireworm dragon ends up at ICARIS, Alex has to decide between her moms’ excitement and keeping the dragon secret.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: During an attempt to get displaced Fire Gronckles back to their native Fire Realm, D’Angelo makes a mistake by accidentally feeding them Catastrophic Quaken eggs.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Eugene discovers the Lair and demands a dragon of his own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: While Jim and Toby search for dates to the Spring Dance the team searches for the Second Triumbric Stone in the marshlands of the Quagawumps.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim is unavailable to do a simple Trollhunter task Toby and Claire take on the responsibility to prove they can carry their weight... literally.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Pixies attack Arcadia Oak High the students and faculty must fight their greatest fears Jim faces Angor Rot which takes an unlikely turn.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: After fruitless searching the universe for Shiro, the Paladins struggle to accept that they must find a new pilot to join the team

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Grug convinces The Croods to go on vacation, and they find a new family, The Broods, who live in a solitary utopia too good to be true/The Croods must escape and warn Ahhh! Valley before it's too late.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Gran moves into the cave with The Croods, she drives Grug nuts and embarrasses Eep in front of the first-ever group of cool kids.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandfather's death, Lucky sets out to show the town his softer side and give him the goodbye he deserves.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Big Oil is bringing big improvements to the school. But new track stables, an upgraded veterinary lab and dorm rooms come at a cost — and spark disaster.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Dozer and the crew must find a way to outsmart a clever bully named Blayde, a new ememy who kidnapped George and destroyed the Dozeratop mounds

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Merry Scary Christmas It's Christmas and Casper wants to spend the holiday with his human pal, Jimmy. Time Waits for No Ghost When Casper discovers a clock that can stop time, everyone wants to use it for his or her own purpose.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ghostbust a Move When Jimmy's dad decides to move the family away from Deedstown, Casper and his friends vow to stop Mr. Bradley from selling their house. My Fair Harpy The Winter Chill Dance is coming up and Ra is determined to be king.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Ping Pong uses her magic to turn Rupert's pedal car into a spaceship they fly to the moon. There they meet the Man on the Moon who runs a cheese stall.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: It's the day of the Nutwood Egg and Spoon race but Raggety has magically turned Ping Pong into a giant egg. How can Ruprt and the friends have their race now?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Rumors of scary sea monsters in the East End take the kids on a journey of discovering you shouldn’t believe everything you hear. / Mysterious globs disturbing the ocean turn out to be the byproduct of food from Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells a tale about unicorns sailing in ships on clouds in search of Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The habitat is celebrating “Sloth Day” in honor of its newest arrival: cool, chill, Lucia the sloth, who just arrived from Costa Rica! At first, the gang is excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever; everywhere they go, people are walking around in sloth masks-- even Kate is fawning over her! Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! When Lucia overhears Melman lament that there’s not enough room in the habitat for another animal, she decides to strike out and go someplace where she is welcome. Realizing the error of his unwelcoming ways, Melman and the gang must try to win Lucia back and bring her back to the habitat before Kate (and the rest of the city) notices she’s gone!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman learns that his friends stay up late every New Year’s Eve to watch the ball drop in Times Square, he’s determined to stay up with the big kids and join the fun. programme.title: Sail GP Racing on The Edge 2026
Waterworld
programme.desc: In Waterworld, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In Oblivion, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: In Miami Vice, undercover detectives played by Jamie Foxx and Colin Farrell navigate danger, crime, and seduction in a gritty, stylish update of the iconic TV series. Also stars Gong Li.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In Pitch Black, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire’s annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Hit the Top
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Former SWAT captain Dong Gu suffers traumatic visual loss during a failed mission for which he is forced to take responsibility. He manages to get over and adapt to the situation with his daughter’s company, until his nemesis appears and puts his daughter in danger. Despite being blind, Dong Gu must fight to save his daughter.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Robot Apocalypse
programme.desc: When expert hacker Tara tries to stop a powerful and sentient A.I. from taking over the world's military, the A.I. marks her as a terrorist who must be exterminated…

programme.title: Iron Squad W

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: I Am Rage
programme.desc: Erin, a troubled young woman with trauma and anger, travels to a remote estate to meet her boyfriend’s family. The visit turns into a nightmare when she discovers they are part of a blood cult. Abducted and marked for harvest, Erin unleashes a deadly rage, turning the hunt into a brutal fight for survival.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join award-winning Malaysian actress Siti Saleha and her husband as they explore the city by day and venture into the night, discovering its vibrant culture and hidden treasures.

programme.title: I Am Rage
programme.desc: Erin, a troubled young woman with trauma and anger, travels to a remote estate to meet her boyfriend’s family. The visit turns into a nightmare when she discovers they are part of a blood cult. Abducted and marked for harvest, Erin unleashes a deadly rage, turning the hunt into a brutal fight for survival.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2

He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn…

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar thinks he hit a homerun with a zombie outside Tampa. As they start to renovate, it's discovered that this house will need a new roof, flooring and an industrial clean-out of the in-ground pool.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to go back in time for a dining experience from a bygone era? In this episode, host Michael Yo transports viewers to a 1920s-style New York City speakeasy.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: In this episode, Rachael cooks up a “meaty” stuffed eggplant.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: Nam-gil and Sang-yoon arrive at the end of Korea, at the beautiful Mihwangsa Temple in Haenam, with a stunning view of the South Sea. They spend a day at the temple, with the head monk.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s freight to plate in this elimination, as the contestants choose from international destinations to inspire their cooking. The top eight spots are up for grabs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: With immunity up for grabs for the top two dishes, the contestants pull out all the stops to impress the judges from a mystery box full of local ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The contestants have a day to take in the sights of Doha to inspire their fine dining degustation menu when the six cooks still on the hunt for immunity will cook at the Michelin starred IDAM restaurant.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to spice up a charred tomato sauce and pasta dinner in two ways. In one dish she's serving the pasta over sausage and in the other she pairs the pasta with chickpeas.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Touched by the heartfelt advice of special judge Jin Goo, some actors are moved to tears. But before they can recover from the emotional moment, the final mission at the Casting House is announced.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare a meat-free holiday meal that everyone will love! First, she makes a flavourful soup using Italian pumpkins. Next, she prepares her family's traditional "Holiday Stars".

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: With rapid societal changes, diverse family structures are emerging beyond traditional norms. In this final episode, we’ll explore "customised family interiors" tailored to various family structures.

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Touched by the heartfelt advice of special judge Jin Goo, some actors are moved to tears. But before they can recover from the emotional moment, the final mission at the Casting House is announced.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: An emotional Theresa finds out her father-in-law has passed and then feels his presence in the following days while shopping for Holy Water.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining without wi-fi facilities might be too much for some people, but anyone wanting to unleash their wild side should join host Michael Yo for a journey to some far-out eating places.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: The zombie team has their work cut out for them when they discover a 3bed/2bath might be missing a bedroom! Termites, collapsing ceilings and some surprises might just be a budget-buster!

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining al-fresco hits new levels as host Michael Yo takes us on a tour of truly unique outdoor dining experiences - like noshing on Kampung-style food while seated in the middle of a river.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It's our contestant's final day in Doha, and they have been granted one last chance at immunity. With only one more spot plus a big prize, Sarah, Alana, Depinder, Snezana and Laura must battle it out.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Back in the kitchen after the Doha trip, four cooks face off to avoid elimination in an emotional ëdual duelí.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The final seven contestants face a mystery box containing garlic as well as a mini mystery box!

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by bringing us three different pastas in all three of its colours. She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Don't feed the animals at these dining establishments, unless they're your dinner companions. Michael joins some furry and ferocious friends for supper on the ocean floor with the sea life of the Maldives.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Standing on stage for the first time in front of a large crowd, each actor must perform a romanctic scene with a partner actress he has just met. Can they overcome the immense pressure?

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: The K-GIM Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping Of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Standing on stage for the first time in front of a large crowd, each actor must perform a romanctic scene with a partner actress he has just met. Can they overcome the immense pressure?

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: This roast chicken and vegetable dish is truly two classics in one: amazing roast chicken with all the flavours of a soul-warming chicken soup, without the soup.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Say ciao with Theresa and the Caputos as the big day finally arrives! Theresa and her family travel to Lake Como for the wedding between Larry Jr and Leah. Spirit can't help but be part of the prep.

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: Casting 1147km

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine

programme.title: Smart Home Killer

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: King Arthur. England's first pop culture superhero, his exploits have inspired numerous blockbuster movies and television series.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As gator season enters its final week, Troy attempts to train the next generation of Landry hunters. Ronnie calls upon Timmy's knowledge of secret honey holes to catch up on his tag count.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Imagine free falling 30,000 feet without a parachute, or being buried alive and living to tell the tale. Or... what about getting trapped in a tiny room inside a sunken ship on the ocean floor...

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The Fellowship believes more than ever that they are finally zeroing in on treasure when they discover Oak Logs which may be part of the legendary platforms leading them to the Money Pit.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: While wars may be won by men, they're fought with weapons. Teetering between the apocalyptic and absurd, declassified records will unveil the secret weapons programs that attempted to bring down the world.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Mike braves icy waters to catch snow crabs living on the seafloor hundreds of feet below; Bret and Ivy travel uncharted terrain to create a new trail and build a log bridge to cross a deep creek.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: 8 powerful kingdoms and 51 kings. Find out how she succeeded in being the only Southeast Asian country to remain independent throughout her history.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Imagine free falling 30,000 feet without a parachute, or being buried alive and living to tell the tale. Or... what about getting trapped in a tiny room inside a sunken ship on the ocean floor...

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: While wars may be won by men, they're fought with weapons. Teetering between the apocalyptic and absurd, declassified records will unveil the secret weapons programs that attempted to bring down the world.

programme.desc: King Arthur. England's first pop culture superhero, his exploits have inspired numerous blockbuster movies and television series.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As gator season enters its final week, Troy attempts to train the next generation of Landry hunters. Ronnie calls upon Timmy's knowledge of secret honey holes to catch up on his tag count.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world’s most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies… Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: In Alone's driest location yet, ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators, and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two champions return for the opportunity to go head to head against one of our titans. After facing off against a fellow champ, only one smith will remain and be tasked with making an M1917 Naval Cutlass.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, Bernard Kroger and another upstart grocer come up with genius innovations that help invent the modern supermarket.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: An upstart named Oscar Mayer creates one of the most iconic meat brands on the planet. While Jay Hormel invents a meat product sold the world over, which becomes part of a 20-billion-dollar food empire.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: The team continues to chase a tunnel that may run directly below the Garden Shaft and into the Baby Blob, where tests revealed high traces of silver and gold.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: After two years of waiting, the team receives the Muon topography data and learns that the cavity known as Aladdin's Cave may have more secrets to tell.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick prepares for battle over a pair of vintage posters, but will he win the war? Meanwhile, Corey takes a look at an old fireman's megaphone. Can he ignite a deal, or will he get hosed?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: When the team launches an illuminated swarm of drones on Skinwalker Ranch, they are stunned by a series of mysterious events.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: The human mind is home to all our thoughts, dreams and memories. The brain allows us to interpret and experience the world we live in. But are there people who are "wired" differently than most of us?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Before toilet paper, Americans used just about anything—until the Scott brothers turned a mistake into an opportunity and invented the toilet paper roll, giving birth to a new billion-dollar industry.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: One spark is all it takes. From the Hindenburg disaster to Krakatoa’s violent volcanic eruption in 1883, these explosions are among history’s deadliest.

programme.title: Testimonies of War: WW2 Remembered in Japan
programme.desc: The story of Japan's '15-Year War,' with a focus on Japanese civilians living on the mainland. This documentary tracks the empire's rapid rise to its devastating final days.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: In the 21st century, the search for extraterrestrial intelligence is ramping up with new technologies allowing us to explore stars across the universe. Are we on the verge of first contact?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: On the coast of Southern California, Mike is hot for a bonanza of out-of-reach surfboards and rare signs. In Vermont, Robbie and Jersey visit an historic homestead complete with a killer observatory.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: Throughout civilisation there are many mighty empires that have risen, only to one day fall. And for some of them, their demise remains a mystery. What can we discover from clues left behind by them?

programme.desc: As gator season enters its final week, Troy attempts to train the next generation of Landry hunters. Ronnie calls upon Timmy's knowledge of secret honey holes to catch up on his tag count.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: As the Oak Island team digs a prime location in the Money Pit area, they unearth stunning clues that could identify just who was behind the 230-year-old treasure mystery.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. But after a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4.
